_note_encounter_ids: ENC-HARD-007 = Extreme 프로필 → deferred(ENC Extreme=Expansion, FullSpecCoverage §7). HARD-005/010 = phase 증원(rear/flank). PAT/AMB/3RD=placement/faction 레인(후속).
_note_enemy_3rd: EN-3RD-01 추적자(Stalker)·02 포획꾼(Snarer)·03 학살자(Reaver) = 제3세력 Stalker Pack (DEC-20260621-001, spec bc22c38). faction='Third'. basic rom_stalker_rip/snarer_dart/reaver_cleave; abilities AB-100~106; pattern PT-023/024/025.
_note_enemy_ids: EN-002/003/004/007/008/009 = P2-S1 stubs (placeholder stats + reused basic AB; spec kit per EN-AI-000/EN-COR-000 = P2-S2). See SPEC_DRIFT.
_note_identity_alts: tank_iron_beacon/bulwark_march/sentinel_form·dps_arc_weave·nuker_flank_collapse·healer_ward_pulse = 비스타터 정체성(기어 선택형 대안, GEAR 카탈로그). 스탯=데모 튜닝(SPEC_DRIFT), ability=PT-pending 스펙 stub의 의도 구현.
_note_party_pool: P2-S6a 파티 능력 풀(D-016 lootable sub) 진행 중. AB-053 Searing Volley(Fire)→skillbook_fire 재사용. 나머지 AB-044~075은 기존 kind 재사용(B2)/신규 effect kind(B1)로 단계 추가.
_note_ability_3rd: AB-100 Pounce·101 Scent of Blood·102 Snare Net·103 Tether·104 Rampage·105 Bloodlust·106 Devour = 제3세력 전용(DEC-20260621-001). 적 측 enemy_* kind = S5 구현. lootable(usable_by_ally+enemy); 아군 skillbook_* 효과(신규 sb_*) = S6a 파티 풀 이연. equipClasses: Pounce/Tether/Devour=Nuker·Snare/Rampage/Bloodlust=Tank·Scent=Healer; AB-105=castCondition HP<50%.
_note_ability_ids: AB-002/010/011 = enemy lootable-shared (S2a). AB-004/008/012/098 = enemy SIGNATURE casts (S2c-1, EN-002/004/007/014). AB-006/013 = enemy mobility dashes (S2c-2, EN-003/008). AB-099 = EN-001 Iron Mockery / Provoked zone control (S2c-3, enemyOnly). AB-020/024/025/026 = party identity. AB-037 = lootable skillbook.
AB-002/010/011 = enemy signature/lootable. AB-020/024/025/026 = player Identity. AB-037 = Ember (skillbook). AB-001/014/015/016 removed (spec→rom_*); AB-S01..S04 removed (non-spec demo subs).
_note_ability_ids_s3f: AB-009/036/039/040/042/043 = kind 'spawn_zone' (S3f, shared) — Oil/Water/ToxicGas/Ice/Wind/Vegetation 존 생성. enemy 시전: EN-004(009/042)·EN-005(039)·EN-007(036/040/043). AB-041 = kind 'enemy_cold' Glacial Bolt(ColdDamageHit emitter, EN-007). 파티 lootable = skillbooks.json(skillbook_zone/skillbook_cold) + sb_zone/sb_cold 이펙트.
_note_enemy_basics: spec EN-COR-000 §rom_* (enemyBasicAttackArchetypeId) — NOT D-016 AB-###. Catalog = data/slice01/enemy_basics.json. Bound per unit via enemies.json basic_attack.
_note_pattern_ids: PT-001~009/012~016 = enemy combat patterns (EN-AI-000, catalog data/slice01/patterns.json). PT-010/020/021/022 = player role auto-patterns (identities.json). PT-011 (TankPlayerToolkit) unused in demo.
_note_base_gear_ids: 스타터 4 = _set 별칭(GEAR-011/021/031/041, Backpack.equipped 착용). 이하 17 = GEAR-012~016/022~026/032~036/042~043 카탈로그(스태시 스페어, 스왑용). gear_mag_* = Magitech.
_note_hub_ids: P2-S4 Hub(F-029/D-029). facility/quest/haul = facilities_tiers.json·quests.json·haul_materials.json. armory catalog gear(gear_ward_*_iron/weave/ward/march/guardbreak/beacon)는 GEAR-COR-000 후속 — 미등록 시 카탈로그 비어있음(효과 stub).
